name: A.M.O Consulting, LLC
description: Legal nurse consultant services including medical record review, opinions on standard of care, and court testimony for medical malpractice, personal injury, and related cases.

name: Lohmeier Consulting
description: Legal nurse consulting with 28 years of active nursing experience in Detroit-area hospitals, recognizing breaches in standards of care.

name: SP Legal Nurse Consulting
description: Certified legal nurse consultants assisting attorneys with medical records, chronologies, timelines, research, pain & suffering reports, medical needs reports, life care reports for personal injury, medical malpractice, and workers compensation cases.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Do not hesitate to put your cases in Shaun's hands, you will not be disappointed.
I would definitely do business with them again.
Professional and accurate, while also retaining personalized human experience.
Top-notch contributor with great attention to detail. Highly recommend!

sentiment.summary: Overwhelmingly positive reviews consistently praise Shaun and SP Legal Nurse Consulting for professionalism, responsiveness, expertise, and a rare combination of big-company processes with personalized, attentive service.
